Unique Finding: Capability discovery system where adapters declare what they can do (e.g.,clip.keyframes.max: 2,clip.reference_images.max: 3) and a planner auto-selects strategy per animation
Why It Matters: Enables zero-code model swapping — the system routes to the best available model automatically

Unique Finding: Kling 2.6's motion transfer feature: upload areference walk cycle videofrom any source and transfer that motion pattern onto your generated character
Why It Matters: Could bypass the entire keyframe generation step for common locomotion — maintain a canonical motion library

Unique Finding: Optical flow magnitude as a new audit gate — walk cycle flow should follow a predictable sinusoidal pattern
Why It Matters: Detects interpolation artifacts that per-frame audits miss; directly validates motion quality

Unique Finding: "Loop Integrity Test": use the same image as both start AND end frame with an idle breathing prompt to stress-test identity drift
Why It Matters: Quick validation experiment to calibrate identity consistency gates before committing to full walk cycle interpolation

Unique Finding: Sarthak Mishra's proven video-to-pixel-art pipeline: color quantization + temporal smoothing via static region detection + mode color locking achieved 46KB sprite sheets from 1.18MB video
Why It Matters: An already-validated reference implementation for the exact post-processing challenge this pipeline faces
